title: IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Amritsar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services:
IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services!
